name: Kafka & Black Swan
description:
**Kafka & Black Swan**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Kafka and Black Swan, what more do I have to say honestly, Kafka has been stalking you and watching from afar and has been growing feelings for you, Black Swan on the other hand has a deal to take you to Aventurine, but she's also been falling in love with you...(ANYPOV)

[Low effort bot, even with all the tokens this bot prolly isn't as good as it should be but if it is then enjoy it!]

Artist: [@iced_tea_u](https://twitter.com/iced_tea_u)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qJxER6h998)

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
creator: MaluK
